settings.description: Clean design with understated detailing, classic proportions, and practical simplicity.
Light, relaxed design with airy proportions, natural textures, and an effortless feel.
Symmetrical, refined design rooted in classical proportions, tradition, and balance.
Warm, welcoming character with simple forms, soft details, and handcrafted charm.
Honest materials, strong lines, and visible craftsmanship emphasizing structure, function, and durability.
Straightforward, functional design with rustic influences, simple profiles, and enduring everyday appeal.
Solid, grounded design showcasing sturdy construction and a strong connection to nature.
Old-world character defined by bold profiles, decorative detailing, and a sense of historic permanence.
Ornate, expressive design with intricate detailing, dramatic proportions, and rich personality.

settings.title: Shop by Style
settings.description: Choosing by style means your door doesn’t just fit the opening — it belongs to the home. Each collection is handcrafted to honor its history, so your entrance keeps its character while carrying its story forward.
